patch.value: Design full pm package manifest and resource model

Define package.json pm manifest semantics for extensions, skills, prompts, themes, docs, commands, and SDK resources, including filtering, precedence, trust, and migration from extension-only terminology.
Package manifest schema is documented and represented in SDK/contracts; resource precedence and compatibility rules are explicit; follow-up implementation tasks are linked.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Plan item created from Pi research: Pi packages bundle extensions,skills,prompts,and themes through package.json resource arrays and conventional directories. pm first slice supports extension resources; broader resource kinds need an explicit manifest design.
